title: Distant Horizons Translate++
description:
Distant Horizons Translation Pack (12+ Languages)

This resource pack provides translations for the Distant Horizons mod, making it more accessible for players around the world.
body:
🌍 **Distant Horizons Translation Pack (12+ Languages)**

This resource pack provides translations for the *Distant Horizons* mod, making it more accessible for players around the world.

✨ **Supported Languages:**

* Russian 
* Ukrainian 
* Japanese 
* German 
* French 
* Spanish 
* Portuguese (Brazil) 
* Italian 
* Polish 
* Turkish 
* Korean 
* Chinese (Simplified) 
* Chinese (Traditional) 

✨ **Features:**

* 🌐 12+ languages supported
* 📖 Translations adapted for better understanding
* 🔄 Updates with new mod versions (when possible)

⚠️ **Important Notes:**

* Translations may contain inaccuracies or “English placeholders”
* Some phrases may feel unnatural or incomplete
* Compatibility is not guaranteed with all versions of *DH* or Minecraft
* Also, this pack will be improved and updated. Languages will be added, compatibility will be improved, and so on.

📦 **Installation:**

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it into your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in Minecraft settings

You may use this pack in modpacks, servers, and other projects without prior permission, provided that proper credit is given and a link to the original project is included.

Сurrent supported version **Distant Horizons** 3.0.3-b

Translation by ▄▀▄▀ᛋᚺᚨᛞᛟᚹ▀▄▀▄
